title: scutellaria rupestris subsp. rechingeri
intro: Scutellaria rupestris subsp. rechingeri is a subspecies of the alpine skullcap plant, which is a member of the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and the Tibetan Plateau. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cognitive function. The health benefits of Scutellaria rupestris subsp. rechingeri are attributed to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been shown to have neuroprotective effects and may help to prevent age-related cognitive decline. Scutellaria rupestris subsp. rechingeri is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused in oil to extract its medicinal properties, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
